_comment: MCP server config for Claude Code agents. Place this at the root of your Claude Code project or set via CLAUDE_MCP_CONFIG env var.

spacemolt._comment: The key 'spacemolt' becomes the MCP server namespace. Tools will be named spacemolt(), spacemolt_social(), etc.
spacemolt._url_comment: Points to the Gantry v2 endpoint. Change the host/port if Gantry is running remotely or on a non-default port (PORT env var, default 3100).
